posts.title: Man wanted for inciting to sedition surrenders to police
posts.description: The Quezon City Police District on Thursday said it has successfully served a warrant of arrest against an individual wanted for inciting to sedition.
posts.tags: QCPD, Quezon City Police District, inciting to sedition

posts.title: DSWD urges stronger cooperation among ASEAN states amid global tensions
posts.description: Social Welfare Secretary Rex Gatchalian called on other members of the Association of Southeast Asian Nations (ASEAN) for stronger cooperation amid global headwinds.
posts.tags: DSWD, ASEAN,Rex Gatchalian,ASEAN Socio-Cultural Community Council

posts.title: No double standard in impeachment proceedings — House justice panel members
posts.description: Leaders of the House Committee on Justice asserted there was no double standard in its deliberations on the impeachment complaints against the country’s two highest officials.
posts.tags: House of Representatives, Sara Duterte, impeachment, Ramil Madriaga

posts.title: ‘I am deeply sorry’: Suntay’s wife breaks silence on husband's Anne Curtis remark
posts.description: The wife of Rep. Bong Suntay has issued a public statement distancing herself and her children from the controversial remarks the Quezon City lawmaker made during a House impeachment hearing, after his comments referencing actress Anne Curtis sparked widespread backlash online.
posts.tags: Bong Suntay, Anne Curtis, Shiela Guevara,ABSnews

posts.title: Rhian Ramos to pursue possible legal action over driver’s assault claims
posts.description: Actress Rhian Ramos said she is already looking into possible legal actions against her former driver, who alleged that she, Michelle Dee, and Sam Panlilio physically assaulted and illegally detained him back in January.
posts.tags: Rhian Ramos, I Fell, It's Fine, assault,ABSnews
